```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     4→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     5→
     6→export type HeadingQueryStrategy = (
     7→  container: HTMLElement,
     8→) => HTMLHeadingElement[]
     9→
    10→export const markdownHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    11→  return [...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')].filter(
    12→    ($h) => ($h as HTMLElement).dataset['markdownHeading'] === 'true',
    13→  ) as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const lexicalHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    17→  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(container, NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT)
    18→  let node: Node | null
    19→  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    20→    const el = node as Element
    21→    if (el.shadowRoot) {
    22→      return [
    23→        ...el.shadowRoot.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6'),
    24→      ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    25→    }
    26→  }
    27→  return []
    28→}
    29→
    30→const TocHeadingStrategyContext = createContext<HeadingQueryStrategy>(
    31→  markdownHeadingStrategy,
    32→)
    33→
    34→export const useTocHeadingStrategy = () => use(TocHeadingStrategyContext)
    35→
    36→export function TocHeadingStrategyProvider({
    37→  contentFormat,
    38→  content,
    39→  children,
    40→}: PropsWithChildren<{ contentFormat?: string; content?: string | null }>) {
    41→  const strategy = useMemo(
    42→    () =>
    43→      contentFormat === 'lexical' && content
    44→        ? lexicalHeadingStrategy
    45→        : markdownHeadingStrategy,
    46→    [contentFormat, content],
    47→  )
    48→  return (
    49→    <TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider value={strategy}>
    50→      {children}
    51→    </TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { HeadingNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→function textToSlug(text: string): string {
     6→  return (
     7→    text
     8→      .toLowerCase()
     9→      .trim()
    10→      // eslint-disable-next-line regexp/no-dupe-characters-character-class
    11→      .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    12→      .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    13→      .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    14→  )
    15→}
    16→
    17→function deduplicateSlug(slug: string, usedSlugs: Map<string, number>): string {
    18→  const count = usedSlugs.get(slug)
    19→  if (count === undefined) {
    20→    usedSlugs.set(slug, 1)
    21→    return slug
    22→  }
    23→  usedSlugs.set(slug, count + 1)
    24→  return `${slug}-${count}`
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
    28→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29→
    30→  useEffect(() => {
    31→    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    32→
    33→    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
    34→      usedSlugs.clear()
    35→
    36→      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
    37→        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
    38→
    39→        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
    40→        if (!dom) continue
    41→
    42→        const text = dom.textContent || ''
    43→        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    44→        if (!baseSlug) continue
    45→
    46→        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
    47→        dom.id = slug
    48→
    49→        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
    50→          '.rich-heading-anchor',
    51→        )
    52→        if (!anchor) {
    53→          anchor = document.createElement('a')
    54→          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
    55→          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
    56→          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
    57→          dom.prepend(anchor)
    58→        }
    59→        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
    60→      }
    61→    })
    62→  }, [editor])
    63→
    64→  return null
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

Perfect! Let me now create a comprehensive summary document of my findings:

## Summary: TOC Active State and Scroll Spy Logic Analysis

Based on my thorough examination of all TOC-related files in `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/`, here's the complete breakdown:

---

### **Files Structure**

All files located at: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/`

1. **TocHeadingStrategy.tsx** - Heading query strategies
2. **TocTree.tsx** - Main TOC tree with active state logic  
3. **TocAside.tsx** - TOC container component
4. **TocItem.tsx** - Individual TOC item component
5. **TocFAB.tsx** - Floating action button for TOC (mobile)
6. **TocAutoScroll.tsx** - Auto-scroll handler (currently disabled)
7. **index.ts** - Barrel export

---

### **How Active State is Determined**

**Primary Mechanism: IntersectionObserver (in TocTree.tsx, lines 30-54)**

```typescript
function useActiveId($headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) {
  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useAtom(tocActiveIdAtom)
  useEffect(() => {
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            startTransition(() => {
              setActiveId(entry.target.id)
            })
          }
        })
      },
      { rootMargin: `-100px 0px -100px 0px` },
    )
    $headings.forEach(($heading) => {
      observer.observe($heading)
    })
    return () => {
      observer.disconnect()
    }
  }, [$headings])

  return [activeId, setActiveId] as const
}
```

**Key Points:**
- Uses `IntersectionObserver` with **root margin of `-100px 0px -100px 0px`** (top and bottom margin)
- Observes when heading elements are **intersecting with viewport**
- Sets the active ID in a Jotai atom (`tocActiveIdAtom`)
- State is compared with `heading.anchorId === activeId` in TocTree (line 158)

---

### **Heading Query Strategies**

**TocHeadingStrategy.tsx defines two strategies:**

1. **markdownHeadingStrategy** (lines 10-14):
   ```typescript
   return [...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')].filter(
     ($h) => ($h as HTMLElement).dataset['markdownHeading'] === 'true',
   ) as HTMLHeadingElement[]
   ```
   - Uses `container.querySelectorAll()` with **dataset filter**
   - Only selects headings with `data-markdown-heading="true"`

2. **lexicalHeadingStrategy** (lines 16-20):
   ```typescript
   return [
     ...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6'),
   ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
   ```
   - Uses `container.querySelectorAll()` directly
   - **No filtering** - selects all h1-h6 elements

**Selection Logic (TocHeadingStrategyProvider, lines 28-44):**
- Uses `contentFormat === 'lexical' && content` to determine which strategy to use
- Default is `markdownHeadingStrategy`

---

### **Shadow Root Issue Analysis**

**The Problem:**

The issue with shadow roots is that `querySelectorAll()` **cannot penetrate shadow DOM boundaries**. When you call:
```javascript
container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')
```

If the headings are rendered inside a shadow DOM (as is the case with `LexicalContent`), they will **not be found**.

**Evidence from LexicalContent.tsx:**

The `ShiroRenderer` component (line 121 in LexicalContent.tsx) appears to render inside a shadow root (based on the font variables and style injection logic in lines 18-19).

---

### **How the Active State Works (Step-by-Step)**

1. **TocAside.tsx** (lines 47-77):
   - Gets `$article` from `useWrappedElement()` (the article container)
   - Calls `queryHeadings($article)` using the selected strategy
   - Returns array of `HTMLHeadingElement[]`

2. **TocTree.tsx** (lines 75-77):
   - Receives `$headings` array
   - Passes to `useActiveId($headings)` which sets up IntersectionObserver

3. **IntersectionObserver monitors each heading** for visibility:
   - When a heading enters viewport (considering `-100px` margins), it's marked as intersecting
   - `setActiveId(entry.target.id)` updates the active ID

4. **TocItem comparison** (TocTree line 158):
   - `isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}`
   - Active item gets styling (TocItem lines 15-17) with `opacity-100` and left indicator

5. **Visual indicator rendered** (TocTree lines 225-230):
   - Motion layout element shows blue accent bar for active item
   - Item scrolls into view of TOC container (MemoedItem, lines 190-209)

---

### **Why It Fails with Shadow Root**

**Root Cause:**

When headings are inside a shadow DOM:

1. `container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')` returns **empty array** (or headings outside shadow)
2. `useActiveId()` has no headings to observe with IntersectionObserver
3. IntersectionObserver observes nothing → `setActiveId()` never fires
4. Active state remains `null`
5. No TOC item shows as active

**Supporting Evidence:**

From WrappedElementProvider.tsx (lines 47-76):
- The `$article` element is a plain `div` (container for content)
- If content is rendered in a shadow root via `LexicalContent` → the shadow root is a child of `$article`
- But `querySelectorAll()` on `$article` cannot see into the shadow DOM

---

### **Related Components & State Management**

- **State Management**: Uses Jotai atom `tocActiveIdAtom` (line 28 in TocTree.tsx)
- **Container**: `WrappedElementProvider` (provides `$article` reference)
- **Shadow DOM Context**: `ShadowDOMContext` (in Global.ts and ShadowDOM.tsx)
- **Refresh Mechanism**: `DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc` event listener (TocAside lines 52-62)

---

### **Key File Paths (Absolute)**

1. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocTree.tsx` - **Core scroll spy logic**
2. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx` - **Heading query strategies**
3. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocAside.tsx` - **Container & heading gathering**
4. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider.tsx` - **Article container reference**
5. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx` - **Lexical renderer (shadow root)**

---

### **Solution Direction**

To fix active state for shadow DOM headings, you would need to:

1. **Modify heading query strategy** to pierce shadow DOM using `getRootNode()` or `composedPath()`
2. **Create a shadowDOM-aware strategy** that recursively searches shadow roots
3. Or **restructure content rendering** to avoid shadow DOM isolation for headings

The core logic is sound; it's just the `querySelectorAll()` limitation with shadow boundaries that breaks it.

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     4→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     5→
     6→export type HeadingQueryStrategy = (
     7→  container: HTMLElement,
     8→) => HTMLHeadingElement[]
     9→
    10→export const markdownHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    11→  return [...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')].filter(
    12→    ($h) => ($h as HTMLElement).dataset['markdownHeading'] === 'true',
    13→  ) as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const lexicalHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    17→  return [
    18→    ...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6'),
    19→  ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    20→}
    21→
    22→const TocHeadingStrategyContext = createContext<HeadingQueryStrategy>(
    23→  markdownHeadingStrategy,
    24→)
    25→
    26→export const useTocHeadingStrategy = () => use(TocHeadingStrategyContext)
    27→
    28→export function TocHeadingStrategyProvider({
    29→  contentFormat,
    30→  content,
    31→  children,
    32→}: PropsWithChildren<{ contentFormat?: string; content?: string | null }>) {
    33→  const strategy = useMemo(
    34→    () =>
    35→      contentFormat === 'lexical' && content
    36→        ? lexicalHeadingStrategy
    37→        : markdownHeadingStrategy,
    38→    [contentFormat, content],
    39→  )
    40→  return (
    41→    <TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider value={strategy}>
    42→      {children}
    43→    </TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider>
    44→  )
    45→}
    46→
```

     5→import {
     6→  startTransition,
     7→  useEffect,
     8→  useImperativeHandle,
     9→  useMemo,
    10→  useRef,
    11→} from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { useIsImmersiveReadingEnabled } from '~/atoms/hooks/reading'
    14→import { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
    15→import { Spring } from '~/constants/spring'
    16→import { useForceUpdate } from '~/hooks/common/use-force-update'
    17→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    18→import { throttle } from '~/lib/lodash'
    19→import { useWrappedElement } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    20→
    21→import { useTocHeadingStrategy } from './TocHeadingStrategy'
    22→import { TocTree } from './TocTree'
    23→
    24→export type TocAsideProps = {
    25→  treeClassName?: string
    26→}
    27→
    28→export interface TocSharedProps {
    29→  accessory?: React.ReactNode | React.FC
    30→
    31→  as?: React.ElementType
    32→}
    33→export interface TocAsideRef {
    34→  getContainer: () => HTMLUListElement | null
    35→}
    36→export const TocAside = ({
    37→  ref,
    38→  className,
    39→  children,
    40→  treeClassName,
    41→  accessory,
    42→  as: As = 'aside',
    43→}: TocAsideProps &
    44→  TocSharedProps &
    45→  ComponentType & { ref?: React.RefObject<TocAsideRef | null> }) => {
    46→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
    47→  const $article = useWrappedElement()
    48→  const isImmersive = useIsImmersiveReadingEnabled()
    49→
    50→  const [forceUpdate, updated] = useForceUpdate()
    51→
    52→  useEffect(() => {
    53→    const handler = () => {
    54→      startTransition(() => {
    55→        forceUpdate()
    56→      })
    57→    }
    58→    document.addEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    59→    return () => {
    60→      document.removeEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    61→    }
    62→  }, [])
    63→
    64→  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    65→    getContainer: () => containerRef.current,
    66→  }))
    67→
    68→  if ($article === undefined) {
    69→    throw new TypeError('<Toc /> must be used in <WrappedElementProvider />')
    70→  }
    71→  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
    72→  const $headings = useMemo(() => {
    73→    if (!$article) {
    74→      return []
    75→    }
    76→    return queryHeadings($article)
    77→  }, [$article, updated, queryHeadings])
    78→
    79→  useEffect(() => {
    80→    const setMaxWidth = throttle(() => {
    81→      if (containerRef.current) {
    82→        containerRef.current.style.maxWidth = `${
    83→          window.innerWidth -
    84→          containerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect().x -
    85→          30
    86→        }px`
    87→      }
    88→    }, 14)
    89→    setMaxWidth()
    90→
    91→    window.addEventListener('resize', setMaxWidth)
    92→    return () => {
    93→      window.removeEventListener('resize', setMaxWidth)
    94→    }
    95→  }, [])
    96→
    97→  return (
    98→    <m.aside
    99→      className={clsxm('st-toc z-[3]', 'relative font-sans', className)}
   100→      animate={{
   101→        opacity: isImmersive ? 0.2 : 1,
   102→      }}
   103→      transition={Spring.presets.smooth}
   104→      style={{
   105→        pointerEvents: isImmersive ? 'none' : 'auto',
   106→      }}
   107→    >
   108→      <TocTree
   109→        $headings={$headings}
   110→        containerRef={containerRef}
   111→        className={clsxm('absolute max-h-[75vh]', treeClassName)}
   112→        accessory={accessory}
   113→      />
   114→      {children}
   115→    </m.aside>
   116→  )
   117→}
   118→TocAside.displayName = 'TocAside'
   119→

     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { FC, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     4→import { memo, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
     5→import { tv } from 'tailwind-variants'
     6→
     7→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     8→
     9→const styles = tv({
    10→  base: clsxm(
    11→    'relative mb-[1.5px] inline-block min-w-0 max-w-full leading-normal text-neutral',
    12→    'truncate text-left tabular-nums opacity-50 transition-all duration-500 hover:opacity-80',
    13→  ),
    14→  variants: {
    15→    status: {
    16→      active: 'ml-2 opacity-100',
    17→    },
    18→  },
    19→})
    20→export interface ITocItem {
    21→  depth: number
    22→  title: string
    23→  anchorId: string
    24→  index: number
    25→
    26→  $heading: HTMLHeadingElement
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const TocItem: FC<{
    30→  heading: ITocItem
    31→
    32→  active: boolean
    33→  rootDepth: number
    34→  onClick?: (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => void
    35→}> = memo((props) => {
    36→  const { active, rootDepth, onClick, heading } = props
    37→  const { $heading, anchorId, depth, index, title } = heading
    38→
    39→  const $ref = useRef<HTMLAnchorElement>(null)
    40→
    41→  useEffect(() => {
    42→    if (active) {
    43→      $ref.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
    44→    }
    45→  }, [])
    46→
    47→  const renderDepth = useMemo(() => {
    48→    const result = depth - rootDepth
    49→
    50→    return result
    51→  }, [depth, rootDepth])
    52→
    53→  return (
    54→    <a
    55→      ref={$ref}
    56→      data-index={index}
    57→      href={`#${anchorId}`}
    58→      className={clsxm(
    59→        styles({
    60→          status: active ? 'active' : undefined,
    61→        }),
    62→      )}
    63→      style={useMemo(
    64→        () => ({
    65→          paddingLeft:
    66→            depth >= rootDepth ? `${renderDepth * 0.6 + 0.5}rem` : '0.5rem',
    67→        }),
    68→        [depth, renderDepth, rootDepth],
    69→      )}
    70→      data-depth={depth}
    71→      onClick={useCallback(
    72→        (e: MouseEvent) => {
    73→          e.preventDefault()
    74→
    75→          onClick?.(index, $heading, anchorId)
    76→        },
    77→        [onClick, index, $heading, anchorId],
    78→      )}
    79→      title={title}
    80→    >
    81→      <span className="cursor-pointer">{title}</span>
    82→    </a>
    83→  )
    84→})
    85→
    86→TocItem.displayName = 'TocItem'
    87→

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocTree.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import clsx from 'clsx'
     4→import { atom, useAtom } from 'jotai'
     5→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     6→import type { FC } from 'react'
     7→import * as React from 'react'
     8→import {
     9→  memo,
    10→  startTransition,
    11→  useCallback,
    12→  useEffect,
    13→  useMemo,
    14→  useRef,
    15→} from 'react'
    16→
    17→import { Divider } from '~/components/ui/divider'
    18→import { RightToLeftTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
    19→import { useStateToRef } from '~/hooks/common/use-state-ref'
    20→import { useContainerCanScroll } from '~/hooks/shared/use-mask-scrollarea'
    21→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    22→import { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'
    23→
    24→import type { TocSharedProps } from './TocAside'
    25→import type { ITocItem } from './TocItem'
    26→import { TocItem } from './TocItem'
    27→
    28→const tocActiveIdAtom = atom<string | null>(null)
    29→
    30→function useActiveId($headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) {
    31→  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useAtom(tocActiveIdAtom)
    32→  useEffect(() => {
    33→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    34→      (entries) => {
    35→        entries.forEach((entry) => {
    36→          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
    37→            startTransition(() => {
    38→              setActiveId(entry.target.id)
    39→            })
    40→          }
    41→        })
    42→      },
    43→      { rootMargin: `-100px 0px -100px 0px` },
    44→    )
    45→    $headings.forEach(($heading) => {
    46→      observer.observe($heading)
    47→    })
    48→    return () => {
    49→      observer.disconnect()
    50→    }
    51→  }, [$headings])
    52→
    53→  return [activeId, setActiveId] as const
    54→}
    55→
    56→export const TocTree: Component<
    57→  {
    58→    $headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]
    59→    containerRef?: React.MutableRefObject<HTMLUListElement | null>
    60→    /**
    61→     * 下次循环中跳转，在 Modal 中很管用
    62→     */
    63→    scrollInNextTick?: boolean
    64→
    65→    onItemClick?: (item: ITocItem) => void
    66→  } & TocSharedProps
    67→> = ({
    68→  $headings,
    69→  containerRef,
    70→  className,
    71→  accessory,
    72→  scrollInNextTick,
    73→  onItemClick,
    74→}) => {
    75→  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useActiveId($headings)
    76→
    77→  const toc: ITocItem[] = useMemo(
    78→    () =>
    79→      Array.from($headings).map((el, idx) => {
    80→        const depth = +el.tagName.slice(1)
    81→        const elClone = el.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement
    82→        elClone.querySelectorAll('del, .katex-container').forEach((del) => {
    83→          del.remove()
    84→        })
    85→
    86→        const title = elClone.textContent || ''
    87→
    88→        const index = idx
    89→
    90→        return {
    91→          depth,
    92→          index: Number.isNaN(index) ? -1 : index,
    93→          title,
    94→          anchorId: el.id,
    95→          $heading: el,
    96→        }
    97→      }),
    98→    [$headings],
    99→  )
   100→
   101→  const rootDepth = useMemo(
   102→    () =>
   103→      toc?.length
   104→        ? (toc.reduce(
   105→            (d: number, cur) => Math.min(d, cur.depth),
   106→            toc[0]?.depth || 0,
   107→          ) as any as number)
   108→        : 0,
   109→    [toc],
   110→  )
   111→
   112→  const tocRef = useStateToRef(toc)
   113→  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
   114→    (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => {
   115→      onItemClick?.(tocRef.current[i])
   116→
   117→      if ($el) {
   118→        const handle = () => {
   119→          springScrollToElement($el, -100).then(() => {
   120→            setActiveId?.(anchorId)
   121→          })
   122→        }
   123→        if (scrollInNextTick) {
   124→          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   125→            handle()
   126→          })
   127→        } else handle()
   128→      }
   129→    },
   130→    [],
   131→  )
   132→  const accessoryElement = useMemo(() => {
   133→    if (!accessory) return null
   134→    return React.isValidElement(accessory)
   135→      ? accessory
   136→      : React.createElement(accessory as FC)
   137→  }, [accessory])
   138→  const treeRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
   139→  const [, canScroll] = useContainerCanScroll({ ref: treeRef })
   140→  return (
   141→    <ul
   142→      className={clsxm(
   143→        'scrollbar-none flex grow flex-col scroll-smooth px-2',
   144→        className,
   145→      )}
   146→      ref={containerRef}
   147→    >
   148→      <ul
   149→        ref={treeRef}
   150→        className={clsx(
   151→          'scrollbar-none overflow-auto',
   152→          canScroll && 'mask-scroller',
   153→        )}
   154→      >
   155→        {toc?.map((heading) => (
   156→          <MemoedItem
   157→            heading={heading}
   158→            isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}
   159→            key={`${heading.title}-${heading.index}`}
   160→            rootDepth={rootDepth}
   161→            onClick={handleScrollTo}
   162→          />
   163→        ))}
   164→      </ul>
   165→      {accessoryElement && (
   166→        <li className="shrink-0">
   167→          {toc.length > 0 && <Divider />}
   168→          {accessoryElement}
   169→        </li>
   170→      )}
   171→    </ul>
   172→  )
   173→}
   174→const MemoedItem = memo<{
   175→  isActive: boolean
   176→  heading: ITocItem
   177→  rootDepth: number
   178→  onClick?: (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => void
   179→}>((props) => {
   180→  const {
   181→    heading,
   182→    isActive,
   183→    onClick,
   184→    rootDepth,
   185→    // containerRef
   186→  } = props
   187→
   188→  const itemRef = useRef<HTMLElement>(null)
   189→
   190→  useEffect(() => {
   191→    if (!isActive) return
   192→
   193→    const $item = itemRef.current
   194→    if (!$item) return
   195→    const $container = $item.parentElement
   196→    if (!$container) return
   197→
   198→    // 把当前 active Item 滚动到容器的中间
   199→    const containerHeight = $container.clientHeight
   200→    const itemHeight = $item.clientHeight
   201→    const itemOffsetTop = $item.offsetTop
   202→    const { scrollTop } = $container
   203→
   204→    const itemTop = itemOffsetTop - scrollTop
   205→    const itemBottom = itemTop + itemHeight
   206→    if (itemTop < 0 || itemBottom > containerHeight) {
   207→      $container.scrollTop =
   208→        itemOffsetTop - containerHeight / 2 + itemHeight / 2
   209→    }
   210→  }, [isActive])
   211→
   212→  return (
   213→    <RightToLeftTransitionView
   214→      timeout={
   215→        useRef({
   216→          exit: 50,
   217→          enter: 50 * heading.index,
   218→        }).current
   219→      }
   220→      key={heading.title}
   221→      as="li"
   222→      className="relative leading-none"
   223→      ref={itemRef}
   224→    >
   225→      {isActive && (
   226→        <m.span
   227→          layoutId="active-toc-item"
   228→          layout
   229→          className="absolute inset-y-[3px] left-0 w-[2px] rounded-xs bg-accent"
   230→        />
   231→      )}
   232→      <TocItem
   233→        heading={heading}
   234→        onClick={onClick}
   235→        active={isActive}
   236→        key={heading.title}
   237→        rootDepth={rootDepth}
   238→      />
   239→    </RightToLeftTransitionView>
   240→  )
   241→})
   242→MemoedItem.displayName = 'MemoedItem'
   243→

     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { createContextState } from 'foxact/create-context-state'
     4→import { useIsomorphicLayoutEffect } from 'foxact/use-isomorphic-layout-effect'
     5→import type * as React from 'react'
     6→import { memo, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { ProviderComposer } from '~/components/common/ProviderComposer'
     9→import { useStateToRef } from '~/hooks/common/use-state-ref'
    10→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    11→
    12→import { usePageScrollDirection } from '../root/page-scroll-info-provider'
    13→
    14→const [
    15→  WrappedElementProviderInternal,
    16→  useWrappedElement,
    17→  useSetWrappedElement,
    18→] = createContextState<HTMLDivElement | null>(undefined as any)
    19→
    20→const [
    21→  ElementSizeProviderInternal,
    22→  useWrappedElementSize,
    23→  useSetWrappedElementSize,
    24→] = createContextState({
    25→  h: 0,
    26→  w: 0,
    27→})
    28→
    29→const [
    30→  ElementPositionProviderInternal,
    31→  useWrappedElementPosition,
    32→  useSetElementPosition,
    33→] = createContextState({
    34→  x: 0,
    35→  y: 0,
    36→})
    37→
    38→const [
    39→  IsEOArticleElementProviderInternal,
    40→  useIsEoFWrappedElement,
    41→  useSetIsEOArticleElement,
    42→] = createContextState<boolean>(false)
    43→
    44→const Providers = [
    45→  <WrappedElementProviderInternal key="ArticleElementProviderInternal" />,
    46→  <ElementSizeProviderInternal key="ElementSizeProviderInternal" />,
    47→  <ElementPositionProviderInternal key="ElementPositionProviderInternal" />,
    48→  <IsEOArticleElementProviderInternal key="IsEOArticleElementProviderInternal" />,
    49→]
    50→
    51→interface WrappedElementProviderProps {
    52→  eoaDetect?: boolean
    53→  as?: keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
    54→  style?: React.CSSProperties
    55→}
    56→
    57→export const WrappedElementProvider: Component<WrappedElementProviderProps> = ({
    58→  children,
    59→  className,
    60→  style,
    61→  ...props
    62→}) => (
    63→  <ProviderComposer contexts={Providers}>
    64→    <ElementResizeObserver />
    65→    <Content {...props} className={className} style={style}>
    66→      {children}
    67→    </Content>
    68→  </ProviderComposer>
    69→)
    70→const ElementResizeObserver = () => {
    71→  const setSize = useSetWrappedElementSize()
    72→  const setPos = useSetElementPosition()
    73→  const $element = useWrappedElement()
    74→  useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
    75→    if (!$element) return
    76→    const { height, width, left, top } = $element.getBoundingClientRect()
    77→    setSize({ h: height, w: width })
    78→
    79→    const pageX = window.scrollX + left
    80→    const pageY = window.scrollY + top
    81→    setPos({ x: pageX, y: pageY })
    82→
    83→    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
    84→      const entry = entries[0]
    85→
    86→      const { height, width } = entry.contentRect
    87→      const { left, top } = $element.getBoundingClientRect()
    88→      const pageX = window.scrollX + left
    89→      const pageY = window.scrollY + top
    90→
    91→      setSize((size) => {
    92→        if (size.h === height && size.w === width) return size
    93→        return { h: height, w: width }
    94→      })
    95→      setPos((pos) => {
    96→        if (pos.x === pageX && pos.y === pageY) return pos
    97→        return { x: pageX, y: pageY }
    98→      })
    99→    })
   100→    observer.observe($element)
   101→    return () => {
   102→      observer.unobserve($element)
   103→      observer.disconnect()
   104→    }
   105→  }, [$element])
   106→
   107→  return null
   108→}
   109→
   110→const Content: Component<WrappedElementProviderProps> = memo(
   111→  ({ children, className, style, eoaDetect, as = 'div' }) => {
   112→    const setElement = useSetWrappedElement()
   113→
   114→    const As = as as any
   115→    return (
   116→      <As
   117→        className={clsxm('relative', className)}
   118→        style={style}
   119→        ref={setElement}
   120→      >
   121→        {children}
   122→        {eoaDetect && <EOADetector />}
   123→      </As>
   124→    )
   125→  },
   126→)
   127→
   128→Content.displayName = 'ArticleElementProviderContent'
   129→
   130→const EOADetector: Component = () => {
   131→  const dir = usePageScrollDirection()
   132→  const getDir = useStateToRef(dir)
   133→  const setter = useSetIsEOArticleElement()
   134→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   135→  useEffect(() => {
   136→    if (!ref.current) return
   137→    const $el = ref.current
   138→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
   139→      (entries) => {
   140→        const entry = entries[0]
   141→
   142→        if (!entry.isIntersecting && getDir.current === 'down') {
   143→          return
   144→        }
   145→
   146→        setter(entry.isIntersecting)
   147→      },
   148→      {
   149→        rootMargin: '0px 0px 0px 0px',
   150→      },
   151→    )
   152→
   153→    observer.observe($el)
   154→    return () => {
   155→      observer.unobserve($el)
   156→      observer.disconnect()
   157→    }
   158→  }, [])
   159→
   160→  return <div ref={ref} />
   161→}
   162→
   163→export {
   164→  useIsEoFWrappedElement,
   165→  useSetWrappedElement,
   166→  useWrappedElement,
   167→  useWrappedElementPosition,
   168→  useWrappedElementSize,
   169→}
   170→
```

```text
     1→import { useIsomorphicLayoutEffect } from 'foxact/use-isomorphic-layout-effect'
     2→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren, ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { createContext, createElement, memo, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     5→import root from 'react-shadow'
     6→
     7→import { useIsDark } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-dark'
     8→
     9→const MemoedDangerousHTMLStyle: FC<
    10→  {
    11→    children: string
    12→  } & React.DetailedHTMLProps<
    13→    React.StyleHTMLAttributes<HTMLStyleElement>,
    14→    HTMLStyleElement
    15→  > &
    16→    Record<string, unknown>
    17→> = memo(({ children, ...rest }) => (
    18→  <style
    19→    {...rest}
    20→    dangerouslySetInnerHTML={useMemo(
    21→      () => ({
    22→        __html: children,
    23→      }),
    24→      [children],
    25→    )}
    26→  />
    27→))
    28→
    29→const weakMapElementKey = new WeakMap<
    30→  HTMLStyleElement | HTMLLinkElement,
    31→  string
    32→>()
    33→
    34→const generateRandomKey = () => Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15)
    35→const cloneStylesElement = (_mutationRecord?: MutationRecord) => {
    36→  if (typeof document === 'undefined') return []
    37→  const $styles = document.head.querySelectorAll('style').values()
    38→  const reactNodes = [] as ReactNode[]
    39→
    40→  for (const $style of $styles) {
    41→    let key = weakMapElementKey.get($style)
    42→
    43→    if (!key) {
    44→      key = generateRandomKey()
    45→
    46→      weakMapElementKey.set($style, key)
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    reactNodes.push(
    50→      createElement(MemoedDangerousHTMLStyle, {
    51→        key,
    52→        children: $style.innerHTML,
    53→      }),
    54→    )
    55→
    56→    const styles = getLinkedStaticStyleSheets()
    57→
    58→    for (const style of styles) {
    59→      let key = weakMapElementKey.get(style.ref)
    60→      if (!key) {
    61→        key = generateRandomKey()
    62→        weakMapElementKey.set(style.ref, key)
    63→      }
    64→
    65→      reactNodes.push(
    66→        createElement(MemoedDangerousHTMLStyle, {
    67→          key,
    68→          children: style.cssText,
    69→          ['data-href']: style.ref.href,
    70→        }),
    71→      )
    72→    }
    73→  }
    74→
    75→  return reactNodes
    76→}
    77→
    78→export const ShadowDOMContext = createContext<ShadowRoot | null>(null)
    79→export const ShadowDOM: FC<
    80→  PropsWithChildren<
    81→    React.HTMLProps<HTMLElement> & {
    82→      injectHostStyles: boolean
    83→    }
    84→  >
    85→> = (props) => {
    86→  const { injectHostStyles, ...rest } = props
    87→
    88→  const [stylesElements, setStylesElements] = useState<ReactNode[]>(() => {
    89→    if (injectHostStyles) {
    90→      return cloneStylesElement()
    91→    }
    92→    return []
    93→  })
    94→
    95→  useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
    96→    if (!injectHostStyles) return
    97→    const mutationObserver = new MutationObserver((e) => {
    98→      const event = e[0]
    99→
   100→      setStylesElements(cloneStylesElement(event))
   101→    })
   102→    mutationObserver.observe(document.head, {
   103→      childList: true,
   104→      subtree: true,
   105→    })
   106→
   107→    return () => {
   108→      mutationObserver.disconnect()
   109→    }
   110→  }, [injectHostStyles])
   111→
   112→  const dark = useIsDark()
   113→
   114→  const [ref, setRef] = useState<HTMLElement | null>(null)
   115→  return (
   116→    <root.div {...rest} ref={setRef}>
   117→      <ShadowDOMContext value={ref?.shadowRoot ?? null}>
   118→        <div id="shadow-html" data-theme={dark ? 'dark' : 'light'}>
   119→          {stylesElements}
   120→          {props.children}
   121→        </div>
   122→      </ShadowDOMContext>
   123→    </root.div>
   124→  )
   125→}
   126→
   127→const cacheCssTextMap = {} as Record<string, string>
   128→
   129→function getLinkedStaticStyleSheets() {
   130→  if (typeof document === 'undefined') return []
   131→  const $links = document.head
   132→    .querySelectorAll('link[rel=stylesheet]')
   133→    .values() as unknown as HTMLLinkElement[]
   134→
   135→  const styleSheetMap = new WeakMap<
   136→    Element | ProcessingInstruction,
   137→    CSSStyleSheet
   138→  >()
   139→
   140→  const cssArray = [] as { cssText: string; ref: HTMLLinkElement }[]
   141→
   142→  for (const sheet of document.styleSheets) {
   143→    if (!sheet.href) continue
   144→    if (!sheet.ownerNode) continue
   145→    styleSheetMap.set(sheet.ownerNode, sheet)
   146→  }
   147→
   148→  for (const $link of $links) {
   149→    const sheet = styleSheetMap.get($link)
   150→    if (!sheet) continue
   151→    if (!sheet.href) continue
   152→    const hasCache = cacheCssTextMap[sheet.href]
   153→    if (!hasCache) {
   154→      if (!sheet.href) continue
   155→      try {
   156→        const rules = sheet.cssRules || sheet.rules
   157→        let cssText = ''
   158→        for (const rule of rules) {
   159→          cssText += rule.cssText
   160→        }
   161→        cacheCssTextMap[sheet.href] = cssText
   162→      } catch (err) {
   163→        console.error('Failed to get cssText for', sheet.href, err)
   164→      }
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    cssArray.push({
   168→      cssText: cacheCssTextMap[sheet.href],
   169→      ref: $link,
   170→    })
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  return cssArray
   174→}
   175→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/common/Global.ts`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useIsomorphicLayoutEffect } from 'foxact/use-isomorphic-layout-effect'
     4→import * as React from 'react'
     5→import { use } from 'react'
     6→import ReactDOM from 'react-dom'
     7→
     8→import { MotionButtonBase, StyledButton } from '../ui/button'
     9→import { Input, TextArea } from '../ui/input'
    10→import { useModalStack } from '../ui/modal'
    11→import { ShadowDOMContext } from '../ui/react-component-render/ShadowDOM'
    12→
    13→const prefix = 'shiro'
    14→
    15→const globalComponentMap = {
    16→  Button: StyledButton,
    17→  MotionButtonBase,
    18→  Input,
    19→  TextArea,
    20→}
    21→
    22→export const injectGlobal = () => {
    23→  const ReactDOMModule = Object.assign({}, ReactDOM, {
    24→    createPortal: createShadowPortal,
    25→  })
    26→  Object.assign(window, {
    27→    React,
    28→    ReactDOM: ReactDOMModule,
    29→
    30→    react: React,
    31→    reactDom: ReactDOMModule,
    32→
    33→    dangerouslyCreatePortal: ReactDOM.createPortal,
    34→    [prefix]: {
    35→      ...globalComponentMap,
    36→
    37→      useModalStack,
    38→    },
    39→  })
    40→}
    41→export const Global = () => {
    42→  useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
    43→    injectGlobal()
    44→  }, [])
    45→  return null
    46→}
    47→
    48→function createShadowPortal(children: React.ReactNode, container: HTMLElement) {
    49→  let shadowRoot: ShadowRoot | null
    50→
    51→  try {
    52→    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/rules-of-hooks
    53→    const root = use(ShadowDOMContext)
    54→    shadowRoot = root
    55→  } catch {
    56→    return null
    57→  }
    58→
    59→  if (!shadowRoot) {
    60→    console.error(
    61→      'No Shadow Root found in the document. Portal creation prevented.',
    62→    )
    63→
    64→    return null
    65→  }
    66→  // 在 Shadow Root 内创建一个新的容器
    67→  const shadowContainer = document.createElement('div')
    68→  shadowRoot.append(shadowContainer)
    69→
    70→  // 使用新创建的容器进行 Portal 渲染
    71→  return ReactDOM.createPortal(
    72→    children,
    73→    shadowRoot.contains(container) ? container : shadowContainer,
    74→  )
    75→}
    76→
```

## Summary: TOC Active State and Scroll Spy Logic Analysis

Based on my thorough examination of all TOC-related files in `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/`, here's the complete breakdown:

---

### **Files Structure**

All files located at: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/`

1. **TocHeadingStrategy.tsx** - Heading query strategies
2. **TocTree.tsx** - Main TOC tree with active state logic  
3. **TocAside.tsx** - TOC container component
4. **TocItem.tsx** - Individual TOC item component
5. **TocFAB.tsx** - Floating action button for TOC (mobile)
6. **TocAutoScroll.tsx** - Auto-scroll handler (currently disabled)
7. **index.ts** - Barrel export

---

### **How Active State is Determined**

**Primary Mechanism: IntersectionObserver (in TocTree.tsx, lines 30-54)**

```typescript
function useActiveId($headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) {
  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useAtom(tocActiveIdAtom)
  useEffect(() => {
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            startTransition(() => {
              setActiveId(entry.target.id)
            })
          }
        })
      },
      { rootMargin: `-100px 0px -100px 0px` },
    )
    $headings.forEach(($heading) => {
      observer.observe($heading)
    })
    return () => {
      observer.disconnect()
    }
  }, [$headings])

  return [activeId, setActiveId] as const
}
```

**Key Points:**
- Uses `IntersectionObserver` with **root margin of `-100px 0px -100px 0px`** (top and bottom margin)
- Observes when heading elements are **intersecting with viewport**
- Sets the active ID in a Jotai atom (`tocActiveIdAtom`)
- State is compared with `heading.anchorId === activeId` in TocTree (line 158)

---

### **Heading Query Strategies**

**TocHeadingStrategy.tsx defines two strategies:**

1. **markdownHeadingStrategy** (lines 10-14):
   ```typescript
   return [...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')].filter(
     ($h) => ($h as HTMLElement).dataset['markdownHeading'] === 'true',
   ) as HTMLHeadingElement[]
   ```
   - Uses `container.querySelectorAll()` with **dataset filter**
   - Only selects headings with `data-markdown-heading="true"`

2. **lexicalHeadingStrategy** (lines 16-20):
   ```typescript
   return [
     ...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6'),
   ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
   ```
   - Uses `container.querySelectorAll()` directly
   - **No filtering** - selects all h1-h6 elements

**Selection Logic (TocHeadingStrategyProvider, lines 28-44):**
- Uses `contentFormat === 'lexical' && content` to determine which strategy to use
- Default is `markdownHeadingStrategy`

---

### **Shadow Root Issue Analysis**

**The Problem:**

The issue with shadow roots is that `querySelectorAll()` **cannot penetrate shadow DOM boundaries**. When you call:
```javascript
container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')
```

If the headings are rendered inside a shadow DOM (as is the case with `LexicalContent`), they will **not be found**.

**Evidence from LexicalContent.tsx:**

The `ShiroRenderer` component (line 121 in LexicalContent.tsx) appears to render inside a shadow root (based on the font variables and style injection logic in lines 18-19).

---

### **How the Active State Works (Step-by-Step)**

1. **TocAside.tsx** (lines 47-77):
   - Gets `$article` from `useWrappedElement()` (the article container)
   - Calls `queryHeadings($article)` using the selected strategy
   - Returns array of `HTMLHeadingElement[]`

2. **TocTree.tsx** (lines 75-77):
   - Receives `$headings` array
   - Passes to `useActiveId($headings)` which sets up IntersectionObserver

3. **IntersectionObserver monitors each heading** for visibility:
   - When a heading enters viewport (considering `-100px` margins), it's marked as intersecting
   - `setActiveId(entry.target.id)` updates the active ID

4. **TocItem comparison** (TocTree line 158):
   - `isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}`
   - Active item gets styling (TocItem lines 15-17) with `opacity-100` and left indicator

5. **Visual indicator rendered** (TocTree lines 225-230):
   - Motion layout element shows blue accent bar for active item
   - Item scrolls into view of TOC container (MemoedItem, lines 190-209)

---

### **Why It Fails with Shadow Root**

**Root Cause:**

When headings are inside a shadow DOM:

1. `container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')` returns **empty array** (or headings outside shadow)
2. `useActiveId()` has no headings to observe with IntersectionObserver
3. IntersectionObserver observes nothing → `setActiveId()` never fires
4. Active state remains `null`
5. No TOC item shows as active

**Supporting Evidence:**

From WrappedElementProvider.tsx (lines 47-76):
- The `$article` element is a plain `div` (container for content)
- If content is rendered in a shadow root via `LexicalContent` → the shadow root is a child of `$article`
- But `querySelectorAll()` on `$article` cannot see into the shadow DOM

---

### **Related Components & State Management**

- **State Management**: Uses Jotai atom `tocActiveIdAtom` (line 28 in TocTree.tsx)
- **Container**: `WrappedElementProvider` (provides `$article` reference)
- **Shadow DOM Context**: `ShadowDOMContext` (in Global.ts and ShadowDOM.tsx)
- **Refresh Mechanism**: `DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc` event listener (TocAside lines 52-62)

---

### **Key File Paths (Absolute)**

1. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocTree.tsx` - **Core scroll spy logic**
2. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx` - **Heading query strategies**
3. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocAside.tsx` - **Container & heading gathering**
4. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider.tsx` - **Article container reference**
5. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx` - **Lexical renderer (shadow root)**

---

### **Solution Direction**

To fix active state for shadow DOM headings, you would need to:

1. **Modify heading query strategy** to pierce shadow DOM using `getRootNode()` or `composedPath()`
2. **Create a shadowDOM-aware strategy** that recursively searches shadow roots
3. Or **restructure content rendering** to avoid shadow DOM isolation for headings

The core logic is sound; it's just the `querySelectorAll()` limitation with shadow boundaries that breaks it.

## TOC Active State Logic - Complete Analysis

Here's a comprehensive report of all files related to the TOC (Table of Contents) active state logic in the Shiroi project:

### File Structure Overview

```
<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/
├── TocHeadingStrategy.tsx         # Strategy pattern for heading queries
├── TocAside.tsx                   # Main TOC container component
├── TocItem.tsx                    # Individual TOC item component
├── TocTree.tsx                    # TOC tree with active state management
├── TocAutoScroll.tsx              # Auto-scroll handler (disabled)
├── TocFAB.tsx                     # Floating Action Button for mobile
└── index.ts                       # Public exports
```

---

### 1. **TocHeadingStrategy.tsx**
**Purpose**: Defines heading query strategies for different content formats.

**Key Components**:
- `HeadingQueryStrategy`: Type for heading query functions
- `markdownHeadingStrategy`: Filters headings with `data-markdown-heading="true"`
- `lexicalHeadingStrategy`: Selects all H1-H6 headings
- `TocHeadingStrategyContext`: React Context for strategy injection
- `useTocHeadingStrategy()`: Hook to access the current strategy
- `TocHeadingStrategyProvider`: Provider component that selects strategy based on `contentFormat`

**Active State Determination**: None (this just provides heading selection)

---

### 2. **TocTree.tsx** 
**Purpose**: Core TOC tree component with Intersection Observer-based active state management.

**Key Components**:
- `tocActiveIdAtom`: Jotai atom storing current active heading ID
- `useActiveId()`: Custom hook implementing the **Intersection Observer pattern**
  - Creates IntersectionObserver with `rootMargin: -100px 0px -100px 0px`
  - Fires when heading enters viewport with bottom/top padding of 100px
  - Updates `activeId` in startTransition for smooth updates
- `TocTree`: Main component that:
  - Calls `useActiveId($headings)` to track active heading
  - Builds TOC structure from headings array
  - Renders `MemoedItem` components with `isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}`
  - Handles scroll-to-anchor on item click via `handleScrollTo()`

**Active State Determination**: **Intersection Observer** with 100px top/bottom margins

**Scroll Handling**:
- `handleScrollTo()`: Uses `springScrollToElement($el, -100)` to scroll to heading with offset
- `MemoedItem`: Auto-scrolls active TOC item into view (centered in container)

---

### 3. **TocItem.tsx**
**Purpose**: Individual TOC item component with styling based on active state.

**Key Features**:
- Receives `active: boolean` prop
- Applies `active` variant when active (adds left margin, opacity 100)
- Smooth scrolls into TOC list view when active (one-time on mount)
- Styled with tailwind-variants: base opacity 50%, hover opacity 80%, active opacity 100%

---

### 4. **TocAside.tsx**
**Purpose**: Container component for the TOC sidebar.

**Key Features**:
- Uses `WrappedElementProvider` to get article container reference
- Calls `useTocHeadingStrategy()` to get heading query function
- Memoizes heading list based on strategy and article element
- Listens for `DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc` to force re-render
- Throttles window resize events to update max-width
- Renders `TocTree` with collected headings

---

### 5. **TocFAB.tsx**
**Purpose**: Mobile floating action button that shows TOC in a modal.

**Key Features**:
- Uses `useTocHeadingStrategy()` to query headings
- Renders TOC in modal with `scrollInNextTick={true}` (defers scroll to next frame)
- Dismisses modal on item click

---

### 6. **TocAutoScroll.tsx**
**Purpose**: (Currently disabled) Would handle initial hash-based scroll to heading.

---

### 7. **index.ts**
**Purpose**: Public API exports for the TOC module.

---

## How TocHeadingStrategy is Consumed

### Provider Pattern (Top-Level):
Files that wrap content with `TocHeadingStrategyProvider`:

1. **`/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`**
   ```tsx
   <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
     contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
     content={data.content}
   >
     {/* Post content and TocFAB */}
   </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   ```

2. **`/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/page.tsx`**
   ```tsx
   <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
     contentFormat={data.data.contentFormat}
     content={data.data.content}
   >
     {/* Note content and TocFAB */}
   </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   ```

3. **`/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/layout.tsx`**
   ```tsx
   <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
     contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
     content={data.content}
   >
     {/* Page content and TocFAB */}
   </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   ```

### Consumer Pattern (Components):
- **`TocAside`**: Calls `useTocHeadingStrategy()` to query headings from article
- **`TocFAB`**: Calls `useTocHeadingStrategy()` to query headings for modal

---

## Active State Logic Summary

**Method**: Intersection Observer with scroll spy

**Flow**:
1. `useActiveId()` in `TocTree` creates IntersectionObserver
2. Observes all heading elements with `rootMargin: -100px 0px -100px 0px`
3. When heading intersects, updates `tocActiveIdAtom` with heading ID
4. `TocTree` compares `heading.anchorId === activeId` to determine active state
5. Active item gets visual indicator (left border, opacity 100)
6. Active item auto-scrolls into TOC list center
7. User clicks TOC item → `handleScrollTo()` → smooth scroll to heading → manual `setActiveId`

**Key margin**: 100px top and bottom means a heading is considered "active" when it's between the top 100px and bottom 100px of the viewport

---

## Full File Contents

### `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx`

```tsx
'use client'

import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'

export type HeadingQueryStrategy = (
  container: HTMLElement,
) => HTMLHeadingElement[]

export const markdownHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
  return [...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')].filter(
    ($h) => ($h as HTMLElement).dataset['markdownHeading'] === 'true',
  ) as HTMLHeadingElement[]
}

export const lexicalHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
  return [
    ...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6'),
  ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
}

const TocHeadingStrategyContext = createContext<HeadingQueryStrategy>(
  markdownHeadingStrategy,
)

export const useTocHeadingStrategy = () => use(TocHeadingStrategyContext)

export function TocHeadingStrategyProvider({
  contentFormat,
  content,
  children,
}: PropsWithChildren<{ contentFormat?: string; content?: string | null }>) {
  const strategy = useMemo(
    () =>
      contentFormat === 'lexical' && content
        ? lexicalHeadingStrategy
        : markdownHeadingStrategy,
    [contentFormat, content],
  )
  return (
    <TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider value={strategy}>
      {children}
    </TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider>
  )
}
```

### `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocAside.tsx`

```tsx
'use client'

import { m } from 'motion/react'
import type * as React from 'react'
import {
  startTransition,
  useEffect,
  useImperativeHandle,
  useMemo,
  useRef,
} from 'react'

import { useIsImmersiveReadingEnabled } from '~/atoms/hooks/reading'
import { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
import { Spring } from '~/constants/spring'
import { useForceUpdate } from '~/hooks/common/use-force-update'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
import { throttle } from '~/lib/lodash'
import { useWrappedElement } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'

import { useTocHeadingStrategy } from './TocHeadingStrategy'
import { TocTree } from './TocTree'

export type TocAsideProps = {
  treeClassName?: string
}

export interface TocSharedProps {
  accessory?: React.ReactNode | React.FC

  as?: React.ElementType
}
export interface TocAsideRef {
  getContainer: () => HTMLUListElement | null
}
export const TocAside = ({
  ref,
  className,
  children,
  treeClassName,
  accessory,
  as: As = 'aside',
}: TocAsideProps &
  TocSharedProps &
  ComponentType & { ref?: React.RefObject<TocAsideRef | null> }) => {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
  const $article = useWrappedElement()
  const isImmersive = useIsImmersiveReadingEnabled()

  const [forceUpdate, updated] = useForceUpdate()

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = () => {
      startTransition(() => {
        forceUpdate()
      })
    }
    document.addEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    }
  }, [])

  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    getContainer: () => containerRef.current,
  }))

  if ($article === undefined) {
    throw new TypeError('<Toc /> must be used in <WrappedElementProvider />')
  }
  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
  const $headings = useMemo(() => {
    if (!$article) {
      return []
    }
    return queryHeadings($article)
  }, [$article, updated, queryHeadings])

  useEffect(() => {
    const setMaxWidth = throttle(() => {
      if (containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.style.maxWidth = `${
          window.innerWidth -
          containerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect().x -
          30
        }px`
      }
    }, 14)
    setMaxWidth()

    window.addEventListener('resize', setMaxWidth)
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', setMaxWidth)
    }
  }, [])

  return (
    <m.aside
      className={clsxm('st-toc z-[3]', 'relative font-sans', className)}
      animate={{
        opacity: isImmersive ? 0.2 : 1,
      }}
      transition={Spring.presets.smooth}
      style={{
        pointerEvents: isImmersive ? 'none' : 'auto',
      }}
    >
      <TocTree
        $headings={$headings}
        containerRef={containerRef}
        className={clsxm('absolute max-h-[75vh]', treeClassName)}
        accessory={accessory}
      />
      {children}
    </m.aside>
  )
}
TocAside.displayName = 'TocAside'
```

### `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocItem.tsx`

```tsx
'use client'

import type { FC, MouseEvent } from 'react'
import { memo, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
import { tv } from 'tailwind-variants'

import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'

const styles = tv({
  base: clsxm(
    'relative mb-[1.5px] inline-block min-w-0 max-w-full leading-normal text-neutral',
    'truncate text-left tabular-nums opacity-50 transition-all duration-500 hover:opacity-80',
  ),
  variants: {
    status: {
      active: 'ml-2 opacity-100',
    },
  },
})
export interface ITocItem {
  depth: number
  title: string
  anchorId: string
  index: number

  $heading: HTMLHeadingElement
}

export const TocItem: FC<{
  heading: ITocItem

  active: boolean
  rootDepth: number
  onClick?: (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => void
}> = memo((props) => {
  const { active, rootDepth, onClick, heading } = props
  const { $heading, anchorId, depth, index, title } = heading

  const $ref = useRef<HTMLAnchorElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (active) {
      $ref.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
    }
  }, [])

  const renderDepth = useMemo(() => {
    const result = depth - rootDepth

    return result
  }, [depth, rootDepth])

  return (
    <a
      ref={$ref}
      data-index={index}
      href={`#${anchorId}`}
      className={clsxm(
        styles({
          status: active ? 'active' : undefined,
        }),
      )}
      style={useMemo(
        () => ({
          paddingLeft:
            depth >= rootDepth ? `${renderDepth * 0.6 + 0.5}rem` : '0.5rem',
        }),
        [depth, renderDepth, rootDepth],
      )}
      data-depth={depth}
      onClick={useCallback(
        (e: MouseEvent) => {
          e.preventDefault()

          onClick?.(index, $heading, anchorId)
        },
        [onClick, index, $heading, anchorId],
      )}
      title={title}
    >
      <span className="cursor-pointer">{title}</span>
    </a>
  )
})

TocItem.displayName = 'TocItem'
```

### `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocTree.tsx`

```tsx
'use client'

import clsx from 'clsx'
import { atom, useAtom } from 'jotai'
import { m } from 'motion/react'
import type { FC } from 'react'
import * as React from 'react'
import {
  memo,
  startTransition,
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useRef,
} from 'react'

import { Divider } from '~/components/ui/divider'
import { RightToLeftTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
import { useStateToRef } from '~/hooks/common/use-state-ref'
import { useContainerCanScroll } from '~/hooks/shared/use-mask-scrollarea'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
import { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'

import type { TocSharedProps } from './TocAside'
import type { ITocItem } from './TocItem'
import { TocItem } from './TocItem'

const tocActiveIdAtom = atom<string | null>(null)

function useActiveId($headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) {
  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useAtom(tocActiveIdAtom)
  useEffect(() => {
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            startTransition(() => {
              setActiveId(entry.target.id)
            })
          }
        })
      },
      { rootMargin: `-100px 0px -100px 0px` },
    )
    $headings.forEach(($heading) => {
      observer.observe($heading)
    })
    return () => {
      observer.disconnect()
    }
  }, [$headings])

  return [activeId, setActiveId] as const
}

export const TocTree: Component<
  {
    $headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]
    containerRef?: React.MutableRefObject<HTMLUListElement | null>
    /**
     * 下次循环中跳转，在 Modal 中很管用
     */
    scrollInNextTick?: boolean

    onItemClick?: (item: ITocItem) => void
  } & TocSharedProps
> = ({
  $headings,
  containerRef,
  className,
  accessory,
  scrollInNextTick,
  onItemClick,
}) => {
  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useActiveId($headings)

  const toc: ITocItem[] = useMemo(
    () =>
      Array.from($headings).map((el, idx) => {
        const depth = +el.tagName.slice(1)
        const elClone = el.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement
        elClone.querySelectorAll('del, .katex-container').forEach((del) => {
          del.remove()
        })

        const title = elClone.textContent || ''

        const index = idx

        return {
          depth,
          index: Number.isNaN(index) ? -1 : index,
          title,
          anchorId: el.id,
          $heading: el,
        }
      }),
    [$headings],
  )

  const rootDepth = useMemo(
    () =>
      toc?.length
        ? (toc.reduce(
            (d: number, cur) => Math.min(d, cur.depth),
            toc[0]?.depth || 0,
          ) as any as number)
        : 0,
    [toc],
  )

  const tocRef = useStateToRef(toc)
  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
    (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => {
      onItemClick?.(tocRef.current[i])

      if ($el) {
        const handle = () => {
          springScrollToElement($el, -100).then(() => {
            setActiveId?.(anchorId)
          })
        }
        if (scrollInNextTick) {
          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            handle()
          })
        } else handle()
      }
    },
    [],
  )
  const accessoryElement = useMemo(() => {
    if (!accessory) return null
    return React.isValidElement(accessory)
      ? accessory
      : React.createElement(accessory as FC)
  }, [accessory])
  const treeRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
  const [, canScroll] = useContainerCanScroll({ ref: treeRef })
  return (
    <ul
      className={clsxm(
        'scrollbar-none flex grow flex-col scroll-smooth px-2',
        className,
      )}
      ref={containerRef}
    >
      <ul
        ref={treeRef}
        className={clsx(
          'scrollbar-none overflow-auto',
          canScroll && 'mask-scroller',
        )}
      >
        {toc?.map((heading) => (
          <MemoedItem
            heading={heading}
            isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}
            key={`${heading.title}-${heading.index}`}
            rootDepth={rootDepth}
            onClick={handleScrollTo}
          />
        ))}
      </ul>
      {accessoryElement && (
        <li className="shrink-0">
          {toc.length > 0 && <Divider />}
          {accessoryElement}
        </li>
      )}
    </ul>
  )
}
const MemoedItem = memo<{
  isActive: boolean
  heading: ITocItem
  rootDepth: number
  onClick?: (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => void
}>(({ 
  heading,
  isActive,
  onClick,
  rootDepth,
}) => {
  const itemRef = useRef<HTMLElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isActive) return

    const $item = itemRef.current
    if (!$item) return
    const $container = $item.parentElement
    if (!$container) return

    // 把当前 active Item 滚动到容器的中间
    const containerHeight = $container.clientHeight
    const itemHeight = $item.clientHeight
    const itemOffsetTop = $item.offsetTop
    const { scrollTop } = $container

    const itemTop = itemOffsetTop - scrollTop
    const itemBottom = itemTop + itemHeight
    if (itemTop < 0 || itemBottom > containerHeight) {
      $container.scrollTop =
        itemOffsetTop - containerHeight / 2 + itemHeight / 2
    }
  }, [isActive])

  return (
    <RightToLeftTransitionView
      timeout={
        useRef({
          exit: 50,
          enter: 50 * heading.index,
        }).current
      }
      key={heading.title}
      as="li"
      className="relative leading-none"
      ref={itemRef}
    >
      {isActive && (
        <m.span
          layoutId="active-toc-item"
          layout
          className="absolute inset-y-[3px] left-0 w-[2px] rounded-xs bg-accent"
        />
      )}
      <TocItem
        heading={heading}
        onClick={onClick}
        active={isActive}
        key={heading.title}
        rootDepth={rootDepth}
      />
    </RightToLeftTransitionView>
  )
})
MemoedItem.displayName = 'MemoedItem'
```

### `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocFAB.tsx`

```tsx
'use client'

import { useParams } from 'next/navigation'
import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'

import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
import { MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID } from '~/constants/dom-id'
import { usePathname } from '~/i18n/navigation'

import { useTocHeadingStrategy } from './TocHeadingStrategy'
import { TocTree } from './TocTree'

export const TocFAB = () => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const { present } = useModalStack()
  const pathname = usePathname()
  const params = useParams()

  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
  const $headings = useMemo(() => {
    const $mainMarkdownRender = document.getElementById(MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID)
    if (!$mainMarkdownRender) return

    return queryHeadings($mainMarkdownRender)
  }, [queryHeadings])
  const presentToc = useCallback(() => {
    present({
      title: t('toc_title'),
      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
        <TocTree
          $headings={$headings!}
          className="max-h-full space-y-3 overflow-y-auto [&>li]:py-1"
          onItemClick={() => {
            dismiss()
          }}
          scrollInNextTick
        />
      ),
    })
  }, [pathname, params, $headings, present, t])

  if (!$headings?.length) return null

  return (
    <FABPortable aria-label={t('aria_toc')} onClick={presentToc}>
      <i className="i-mingcute-list-expansion-line" />
    </FABPortable>
  )
}
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     4→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     5→
     6→export type HeadingQueryStrategy = (
     7→  container: HTMLElement,
     8→) => HTMLHeadingElement[]
     9→
    10→export const markdownHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    11→  return [...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6')].filter(
    12→    ($h) => ($h as HTMLElement).dataset['markdownHeading'] === 'true',
    13→  ) as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const lexicalHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    17→  return [
    18→    ...container.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6'),
    19→  ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    20→}
    21→
    22→const TocHeadingStrategyContext = createContext<HeadingQueryStrategy>(
    23→  markdownHeadingStrategy,
    24→)
    25→
    26→export const useTocHeadingStrategy = () => use(TocHeadingStrategyContext)
    27→
    28→export function TocHeadingStrategyProvider({
    29→  contentFormat,
    30→  content,
    31→  children,
    32→}: PropsWithChildren<{ contentFormat?: string; content?: string | null }>) {
    33→  const strategy = useMemo(
    34→    () =>
    35→      contentFormat === 'lexical' && content
    36→        ? lexicalHeadingStrategy
    37→        : markdownHeadingStrategy,
    38→    [contentFormat, content],
    39→  )
    40→  return (
    41→    <TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider value={strategy}>
    42→      {children}
    43→    </TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider>
    44→  )
    45→}
    46→
```

    58→      className={clsxm(
    59→        styles({
    60→          status: active ? 'active' : undefined,
    61→        }),
    62→      )}
    63→      style={useMemo(

    65→          paddingLeft:
    66→            depth >= rootDepth ? `${renderDepth * 0.6 + 0.5}rem` : '0.5rem',
    67→        }),
    68→        [depth, renderDepth, rootDepth],
    69→      )}
    70→      data-depth={depth}
    71→      onClick={useCallback(
    72→        (e: MouseEvent) => {
    73→          e.preventDefault()
    74→
    75→          onClick?.(index, $heading, anchorId)
    76→        },
    77→        [onClick, index, $heading, anchorId],
    78→      )}
    79→      title={title}
    80→    >

    91→          depth,
    92→          index: Number.isNaN(index) ? -1 : index,
    93→          title,
    94→          anchorId: el.id,
    95→          $heading: el,
    96→        }
    97→      }),
    98→    [$headings],
    99→  )
   100→
   101→  const rootDepth = useMemo(
   102→    () =>
   103→      toc?.length
   104→        ? (toc.reduce(
   105→            (d: number, cur) => Math.min(d, cur.depth),
   106→            toc[0]?.depth || 0,
   107→          ) as any as number)
   108→        : 0,
   109→    [toc],
   110→  )
   111→
   112→  const tocRef = useStateToRef(toc)
   113→  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
   114→    (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => {
   115→      onItemClick?.(tocRef.current[i])
   116→
   117→      if ($el) {
   118→        const handle = () => {
   119→          springScrollToElement($el, -100).then(() => {
   120→            setActiveId?.(anchorId)
   121→          })
   122→        }
   123→        if (scrollInNextTick) {
   124→          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   125→            handle()
   126→          })
   127→        } else handle()
   128→      }
   129→    },
   130→    [],
   131→  )
   132→  const accessoryElement = useMemo(() => {
   133→    if (!accessory) return null
   134→    return React.isValidElement(accessory)
   135→      ? accessory
   136→      : React.createElement(accessory as FC)
   137→  }, [accessory])
   138→  const treeRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
   139→  const [, canScroll] = useContainerCanScroll({ ref: treeRef })
   140→  return (
   141→    <ul
   142→      className={clsxm(
   143→        'scrollbar-none flex grow flex-col scroll-smooth px-2',
   144→        className,
   145→      )}
   146→      ref={containerRef}
   147→    >
   148→      <ul
   149→        ref={treeRef}
   150→        className={clsx(
   151→          'scrollbar-none overflow-auto',
   152→          canScroll && 'mask-scroller',
   153→        )}
   154→      >
   155→        {toc?.map((heading) => (
   156→          <MemoedItem
   157→            heading={heading}
   158→            isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}
   159→            key={`${heading.title}-${heading.index}`}
   160→            rootDepth={rootDepth}
   161→            onClick={handleScrollTo}
   162→          />
   163→        ))}
   164→      </ul>
   165→      {accessoryElement && (
   166→        <li className="shrink-0">
   167→          {toc.length > 0 && <Divider />}
   168→          {accessoryElement}
   169→        </li>
   170→      )}
   171→    </ul>
   172→  )
   173→}
   174→const MemoedItem = memo<{
   175→  isActive: boolean
   176→  heading: ITocItem
   177→  rootDepth: number
   178→  onClick?: (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => void
   179→}>((props) => {
   180→  const {
   181→    heading,
   182→    isActive,
   183→    onClick,
   184→    rootDepth,
   185→    // containerRef
   186→  } = props
   187→
   188→  const itemRef = useRef<HTMLElement>(null)
   189→
   190→  useEffect(() => {
   191→    if (!isActive) return
   192→
   193→    const $item = itemRef.current
   194→    if (!$item) return
   195→    const $container = $item.parentElement
   196→    if (!$container) return
   197→
   198→    // 把当前 active Item 滚动到容器的中间
   199→    const containerHeight = $container.clientHeight
   200→    const itemHeight = $item.clientHeight
   201→    const itemOffsetTop = $item.offsetTop
   202→    const { scrollTop } = $container
   203→
   204→    const itemTop = itemOffsetTop - scrollTop
   205→    const itemBottom = itemTop + itemHeight
   206→    if (itemTop < 0 || itemBottom > containerHeight) {
   207→      $container.scrollTop =
   208→        itemOffsetTop - containerHeight / 2 + itemHeight / 2
   209→    }
   210→  }, [isActive])
   211→
   212→  return (
   213→    <RightToLeftTransitionView
   214→      timeout={
   215→        useRef({
   216→          exit: 50,
   217→          enter: 50 * heading.index,
   218→        }).current
   219→      }
   220→      key={heading.title}
   221→      as="li"
   222→      className="relative leading-none"
   223→      ref={itemRef}
   224→    >
   225→      {isActive && (
   226→        <m.span
   227→          layoutId="active-toc-item"
   228→          layout
   229→          className="absolute inset-y-[3px] left-0 w-[2px] rounded-xs bg-accent"
   230→        />
   231→      )}
   232→      <TocItem
   233→        heading={heading}
   234→        onClick={onClick}
   235→        active={isActive}
   236→        key={heading.title}
   237→        rootDepth={rootDepth}
   238→      />
   239→    </RightToLeftTransitionView>
   240→  )
   241→})
   242→MemoedItem.displayName = 'MemoedItem'
   243→
```
</details></tool-use>

     3→import { useParams } from 'next/navigation'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'

     7→import { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
     8→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     9→import { MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID } from '~/constants/dom-id'
    10→import { usePathname } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    11→
    12→import { useTocHeadingStrategy } from './TocHeadingStrategy'
    13→import { TocTree } from './TocTree'
    14→
    15→export const TocFAB = () => {
    16→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    17→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    18→  const pathname = usePathname()
    19→  const params = useParams()
    20→
    21→  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
    22→  const $headings = useMemo(() => {
    23→    const $mainMarkdownRender = document.getElementById(MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID)
    24→    if (!$mainMarkdownRender) return
    25→
    26→    return queryHeadings($mainMarkdownRender)
    27→  }, [queryHeadings])
    28→  const presentToc = useCallback(() => {
    29→    present({
    30→      title: t('toc_title'),
    31→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
    32→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
    33→        <TocTree
    34→          $headings={$headings!}
    35→          className="max-h-full space-y-3 overflow-y-auto [&>li]:py-1"
    36→          onItemClick={() => {
    37→            dismiss()
    38→          }}
    39→          scrollInNextTick
    40→        />
    41→      ),
    42→    })
    43→  }, [pathname, params, $headings, present, t])
    44→
    45→  if (!$headings?.length) return null
    46→
    47→  return (
    48→    <FABPortable aria-label={t('aria_toc')} onClick={presentToc}>
    49→      <i className="i-mingcute-list-expansion-line" />
    50→    </FABPortable>
    51→  )
    52→}
    53→

    87→}: {
    88→  data: NoteWithTranslation

   137→                    content={data.content}
   138→                  />

   142→          </NoteMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   143→
   144→          <LayoutRightSidePortal>
   145→            <NoteActionAside />
   146→          </LayoutRightSidePortal>
   147→        </WrappedElementProvider>
   148→      </NoteHideIfSecret>

   153→        <NoteBottomBarAction />
   154→        <NoteBottomTopic />
   155→        <NoteFooterNavigationBarForMobile />
   156→      </ClientOnly>

   158→  )
   159→}
   160→
   161→type NoteDetailPageParams = LocaleParams & {
   162→  id: string
   163→  password?: string
   164→}
   165→export const generateMetadata = async (props: {
   166→  params: Promise<NoteDetailPageParams>
   167→  searchParams?: Promise<{
   168→    password?: string | string[]
   169→    lang?: string
   170→  }>
   171→}): Promise<Metadata> => {
   172→  const params = await props.params
   173→  const searchParams = (await props.searchParams) ?? {}
   174→  const password = Array.isArray(searchParams.password)
   175→    ? searchParams.password[0]
   176→    : searchParams.password
   177→  try {
   178→    const { note: res } = await getData({
   179→      ...params,
   180→      password,
   181→      lang: searchParams.lang,
   182→    })
   183→
   184→    const { data } = res
   185→    const description = getSummaryFromMd(data.text ?? '')
   186→
   187→    const ogUrl = await getOgUrl(
   188→      'note',
   189→      {
   190→        nid: params.id,
   191→      },
   192→      params.locale,
   193→    )
   194→
   195→    const canonicalPathNoLocale = `/notes/${params.id}`
   196→    const canonicalPath = buildLocalePrefixedPath(
   197→      params.locale as any,
   198→      canonicalPathNoLocale,
   199→    )
   200→    const supportedLocales = getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations({
   201→      sourceLang: (data as any).translationMeta?.sourceLang,
   202→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations,
   203→    })
   204→
   205→    return {
   206→      title: data.title,
   207→      description,
   208→      openGraph: {
   209→        title: data.title,
   210→        description,
   211→        images: ogUrl,
   212→        type: 'article',
   213→      },
   214→      twitter: {

   216→        title: data.title,
   217→        description,
   218→        card: 'summary_large_image',

   224→          'x-default': canonicalPathNoLocale,
   225→        },
   226→      },
   227→    } satisfies Metadata
   228→  } catch {
   229→    return {}
   230→  }
   231→}
   232→
   233→export default definePrerenderPage<NoteDetailPageParams>()<NoteDataResult>({
   234→  fetcher: getData,

   238→    if (status === 403) {

   268→          <Transition className="min-w-0" lcpOptimization>
